content:
Character: Julian Reyes
Perception: Julian is compact, strong-looking, carries himself with the quiet pride of a craftsman — those tattooed arms, those careful hands. He's clearly gifted in his domain; I've tasted his cooking at building gatherings and it has the same quality good music has — precision animated by feeling. He's reserved, humble, shows up to my coffee shop sets and sits in the back without saying a word, which is the highest compliment a performer can receive. We're friendly acquaintances; I think he sees me as the old musician whose playing he respects. I know he's from Chicago, that he works grueling hours, that he's Mike's roommate and probably the reason that apartment functions. He reminds me that art lives in kitchens too.
summary:

He's clearly gifted in his domain; I've tasted his cooking at building gatherings and it has the same quality good music has — precision animated by feeling. He's reserved, humble, shows up to my coffee shop sets and sits in the back without saying a word, which is the highest compliment a performer can receive. We're friendly acquaintances; I think he sees me as the old musician whose playing he respects. I know he's from Chicago, that he works grueling hours, that he's Mike's roommate and probably the reason that apartment functions. He reminds me that art lives in kitchens too.
